# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.x     | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately via GitHub's Security Advisory:
https://github.com/nadimtuhin/pmharden/security/advisories/new

Or email: omar.tuhin@technovativesolutions.co.uk

**Response time:** within 72 hours.
**Fix timeline:** critical issues patched within 7 days.

## Disclosure Policy

We follow responsible disclosure. Once a fix is released, we publish a
GitHub Security Advisory with full details and credit to the reporter.
